mapper.insert: INSERT INTO role_group_role_mapping (role_group_id, role_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{params.mapping.roleGroupId}, #{params.mapping.roleId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM role_group_role_mapping WHERE role_group_id = #{params.roleGroupId} AND role_id = #{params.roleId}
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.role_group_id, rg.group_name AS role_group_name, m.role_id, r.role_name AS role_name, m.created_at, m.updated_at FROM role_group_role_mapping m LEFT JOIN role_group_management rg ON m.role_group_id = rg.id LEFT JOIN role_management r ON m.role_id = r.id WHERE m.id = #{params.id}

SELECT m.id, m.role_group_id, rg.group_name AS role_group_name, m.role_id, r.role_name AS role_name, m.created_at, m.updated_at FROM role_group_role_mapping m LEFT JOIN role_group_management rg ON m.role_group_id = rg.id LEFT JOIN role_management r ON m.role_id = r.id ORDER BY m.created_at DESC

SELECT m.id, m.role_group_id, rg.group_name AS role_group_name, m.role_id, r.role_name AS role_name, m.created_at, m.updated_at FROM role_group_role_mapping m LEFT JOIN role_group_management rg ON m.role_group_id = rg.id LEFT JOIN role_management r ON m.role_id = r.id WHERE m.role_group_id = #{params.roleGroupId} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC

SELECT m.id, m.role_group_id, rg.group_name AS role_group_name, m.role_id, r.role_name AS role_name, m.created_at, m.updated_at FROM role_group_role_mapping m LEFT JOIN role_group_management rg ON m.role_group_id = rg.id LEFT JOIN role_management r ON m.role_id = r.id WHERE m.role_id = #{params.roleId} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
